criteria_editor.title: Criteria Settings
criteria_editor.info_text:
Formatting rules:

• The  /  symbol is a visual separator.
• The  >  symbol is a hidden line break marker. It forces the text after it to wrap to the next line.
criteria_editor.error_min: There must be at least 2 criteria.
